response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional breadth as a full-stack software engineer with 18+ years of experience and strong mentoring capabilities, he is fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. The position demands deep C++ expertise with 8–12 years of hands-on systems programming; Bogdan has only 6 months of C++ experience from 2014–2015, with his recent decade focused entirely on web/backend development (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang). He also lacks industrial automation, IoT, manufacturing, and industrial-cybersecurity domain expertise (IEC 62443, SDL), which are central to the role. His educational background (BS Computer Science vs. required B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech) and career trajectory suggest a full-stack generalist rather than a systems programmer suited for on-premises industrial machinery solutions.
strengths: Proven mentoring and teaching track record—organized workshops, courses, and refactoring dojos demonstrating ability to elevate team technical standards
Exceptional adaptability across 8+ programming languages and diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, GIS, DevOps), indicating strong problem-solving and learning agility
Deep architectural thinking and design-pattern knowledge evidenced by open-source projects and roles at tier-1 companies (Naver, Tencent, National Instruments)
concerns: Critical C++ expertise gap—only 6 months of C++ experience (2014–2015); role requires 8–12 years; recent decade spent in Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang
No industrial automation, IoT, manufacturing, or industrial-cybersecurity domain experience; no evidence of IEC 62443, SDL, Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, IEC 104, DNP 3.0, or OPC UA protocols
Educational credential mismatch—holds BS Computer Science; role specifies B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech; career is full-stack web/backend, not systems programming

key_factors.factor: C++ systems programming expertise gap (10+ years inactive)
Industrial automation and cybersecurity domain absence
Strong mentoring, architecture, and collaboration capabilities
